widgets_values: 2 stage模式差别跟distill差别不大，只是普通模型用 distill lora ,ksampler 的cfg可以调整
2 stage模式差别跟distill差别不大，只是普通模型用 distill lora

cfg_scale	Classifier-Free Guidance scale. Higher values make the output adhere more strongly to the text prompt. Typical values: 2.0–5.0. Set to 1.0 to disable.
stg_scale	Spatio-Temporal Guidance scale. Controls perturbation-based guidance for improved temporal coherence. Typical values: 0.5–1.5. Set to 0.0 to disable.
stg_blocks	Which transformer blocks to perturb for STG (e.g., [29] for the last block). Set to [] to disable STG.
rescale_scale	Rescales the guided prediction to match the variance of the conditional prediction. Helps prevent over-saturation. Typical values: 0.5–0.7. Set to 0.0 to disable.
modality_scale	Modality CFG scale. Steers the model away from unsynced video and audio results, improving audio-visual coherence. Set to 1.0 to disable.
skip_step	Skip guidance every N steps. Can speed up inference with minimal quality loss. Set to 0 to disable (never skip).
# examples 
video_guider_params = MultiModalGuiderParams(
    cfg_scale=3.0,
    stg_scale=1.0,
    rescale_scale=0.7,
    modality_scale=3.0,
    skip_step=0,
    stg_blocks=[29],
)

audio_guider_params = MultiModalGuiderParams(
    cfg_scale=7.0,
    stg_scale=1.0,
    rescale_scale=0.7,
    modality_scale=3.0,
    skip_step=0,
    stg_blocks=[29],
)

description": "A cinematic medium shot of a young man resistance fighter concealed behind a moss-covered fallen tree in a dense jungle. He remains still for a brief moment, bolt-action rifle raised and steady as he carefully aims toward the left side of the frame, his breathing slow and controlled. He fires a single decisive shot, the rifle recoiling sharply with a brief muzzle flash cutting through the muted green forest. After the shot, he holds his position, eyes fixed forward as he listens, then lowers the rifle slightly. He steps out from behind cover and begins walking slowly toward the left side of the frame, gripping the weapon firmly and carrying it ready across his body. His expression is calm but heavy, eyes scanning ahead with quiet focus. The camera pans smoothly left with his movement, revealing a deer lying completely motionless on the forest floor, lifeless among leaves and undergrowth. He pauses briefly, acknowledging the fallen animal, then continues forward without haste.",
